page_content:
ENCE424 Communication for Project Managers (3 Credits)

Learn the fundamentals of communications for project managers. Emphasis is on interpersonal and group communications; through voice, electronic, and written messages; project cycle and reports and presentations during this cycle; and communications for employment. Prerequisite: Permission of ENGR-Civil & Environmental Engineering department.

Jointly offered with: ENCE614.

Restriction: Must be in a major in ENGR-A. James Clark School of Engineering; or must be in the Construction Project Management minor; or must be in the Project Management minor.

Credit Only Granted for. ENCE424 or ENCE614.
